steps.observed: Studio page loaded successfully with canvas, toolbar, and right panel

steps.action: Measure shortcuts button position via getBoundingClientRect()
steps.expected: Button at left of canvas, not overlapping sidebar
steps.observed: Shortcuts button at x=56, y=658. Left toolbar ends at x=47 (maxRight=47). Gap of 9px between toolbar and button. No overlap.
Right panel starts at x=892, shortcuts button right edge at x=195. No overlap.

evidence.consoleErrors: Expected errors only (test-project UUID invalid for Supabase)

assertions.title: Shortcuts Overlay Centered on Page

steps.action: Click Shortcuts button to open overlay
steps.expected: Keyboard Shortcuts overlay appears centered on viewport
steps.observed: Keyboard Shortcuts overlay appeared but is NOT centered

steps.expected: Overlay panel center aligns with viewport center (640, 360)
steps.observed: Panel top-left at (640, 360), dimensions 600x576. Panel center at (940, 648) instead of viewport center (640, 360). Horizontal offset: +300px, Vertical offset: +288px.

steps.action: Inspect CSS classes and computed styles
steps.observed: CSS classes present: 'fixed left-1/2 top-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2'. CSS variables set: --tw-translate-x: -50%, --tw-translate-y: -50%. BUT computed transform: 'none', computed translate: 'none'. The centering transform is NOT being applied.
Overlay visually positioned in bottom-right quadrant with top-left corner at viewport center

assertions.issues: The shortcuts overlay panel has the correct Tailwind CSS classes for centering (fixed left-1/2 top-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2) and the CSS custom properties are set (--tw-translate-x: -50%, --tw-translate-y: -50%), but the computed transform is 'none'. The translate transform is not being applied, causing the panel's top-left corner to sit at the viewport center instead of the panel being centered. This appears to be a Tailwind CSS transform composition issue where the transform utility classes are not generating the actual CSS transform property.

steps.expected: QueueIndicator in top-left of canvas area
steps.observed: QueueIndicator button found at position (17, 75), clearly in top-left of canvas. Header ends at y=56, button is 19px below header.
isTopLeft: true. x=17 (far left), y=75 (just below header). Width=198, height=44.
Queue button clickable, shows '0 active' status. After workflow generation, updated to '1 queued'.
Screenshot clearly shows Queue indicator in top-left corner

assertions.title: Workflow Generator in Right Panel Tab

steps.expected: Generate/Workflow tab present among panel tabs
steps.observed: Right panel has three tabs: Gallery, Nodes, Generate. 'Generate' tab present at x=1102.

steps.expected: Workflow Generator UI appears in panel
steps.observed: Workflow Generator UI displayed with header 'Workflow Generator - Generate a connected graph using your current canvas context', preset prompts (Coffee shop marketing, Product description copy, Social media pack, Logo exploration, Video production plan), EXAMPLES section, text input, and submit button.

steps.expected: No floating popover or button for workflow generation outside right panel
steps.observed: All generate/workflow-related buttons are within the right panel (x > 700). No floating popovers found (0 open popovers). Old popover removed.

assertions.title: Workflow Generator Tab Generates and Inserts

steps.action: Type prompt in workflow generator input
steps.observed: Typed 'Create a simple image generation workflow' in the text input. Submit button became enabled.

steps.action: Click submit button to generate workflow
steps.expected: Workflow generation triggered, nodes appear on canvas
steps.observed: Generation triggered. Console log: '🎨 Adding generated workflow: {nodes: 1, edges: 0}'. A GENERATED IMAGE node appeared on canvas with generated prompt 'A serene landscape with a mountain range, misty valleys, and a sunny sky, realistic style, high-definition quality'.

steps.expected: Node has correct UI and is queued
steps.observed: Node shows QUEUED status badge. Queue indicator updated to '1 queued'. Node has image preview placeholder, prompt text, AUTO settings, and execution controls. Node execution attempted but failed with 'Not authenticated' (expected in test mode).
Expected errors only: Supabase UUID validation (test-project), authentication error for execution. No unhandled promise rejections.

evidence.consoleErrors: Expected: Supabase 400/404 (test-project UUID), execution auth error. No unhandled errors.
evidence.network: POST to generate-workflow edge function -> success (nodes returned). POST to save_compute_graph -> 404 (expected, test project). Execution -> auth error (expected).

frictions.description: Preset overlay appears on first load of studio page, requiring dismissal before testing canvas layout
Shortcuts overlay close button (X) requires re-snapshot after opening to find the new button ref
frictions.resolution: Re-snapshotted to get the X button ref, then clicked it

frictions.description: Using 'test-project' as project ID causes Supabase UUID validation errors in console, though studio UI still functions
frictions.resolution: Errors are expected and non-blocking for UI validation

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 4 passed, 1 failed. VAL-STUDIO-003 (shortcuts button position), VAL-STUDIO-005 (queue top-left), VAL-STUDIO-006 (workflow generator tab), VAL-STUDIO-007 (workflow generation) all pass. VAL-STUDIO-004 FAILS: the shortcuts overlay has correct centering CSS classes (fixed left-1/2 top-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2) but the Tailwind translate transform is not being applied (computed transform: none), causing the panel to display offset to the bottom-right instead of centered.
